title: tinospora esiangkara
intro: Tinospora esiangkara, also known as Tinospora crispa, is a species of flowering plant in the family Menispermaceae. This plant is native to Southeast Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal and health benefits. The medicinal properties of Tinospora esiangkara include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Tinospora esiangkara is often used in traditional medicine to make infusions, decoctions, and tonics that can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
